response.justification: Bogdan brings strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His deep testing culture, open-source contributions, and cross-language proficiency (including Java/Kotlin) are major assets. Concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in production contexts, and no clear evidence of recent enterprise automation tooling experience.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong testing culture with multiple open-source testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in work history
Limited evidence of enterprise internal tooling experience
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
